records.ety: [OF. precious, precius, precios, F. prcieux, L. pretiosus, fr. pretium price, worth, value. See Price.]

defs: Of great price; costly; as, a precious stone.
Of great value or worth; very valuable; highly esteemed; dear; beloved; as, precious recollections.
quotes: She is more precious than rules.
Many things which are most precious are neglected only because the value of them lieth hid.
notes: Also used ironically; as, a precious rascal.

defs: Particular; fastidious; overnice; overrefined. Cf. Prcieuse, Preciosity.
quotes: Lest that precious folk be with me wroth.
